rows.description: Recepta Varia

rows.description: Mr Chorton Rent due Mich'mas 1817 —
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash ('Chorton', 'Mich'mas') visually confirmed over gpt-5-mini ('Chesterton', 'Mechmas'). Amount '10.-.-' confirmed from image, which gpt-5-mini correctly extracted but gemini-flash did not (interpreting dash as 0 amount for the row, rather than 0 shillings/pence).

rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent due at Michaelmas 1817 from Mr Chorton, amounting to £10 0s 0d.
